name: cursor-multi-ai
description: Manage communication between your application and an Ollama model using the 'ollama' provider.

aiSuite.serverUrl.description: The URL of the shared AI Suite server used by all modules.

aiSuite.authToken.description: An optional bearer token that will be sent with every request to the shared AI Suite server for authentication purposes.

aiSuite.timeout.description: The timeout in milliseconds for requests made to the AI Suite server. Adjust this value based on your network conditions and server response times.

aiSuite.simple.serviceSlug.description: The endpoint service slug used by the Simple AI module, which maps to /chat/{serviceSlug}. You can specify a custom service or use one of the predefined ones.

aiSuite.simple.provider.description: The provider for sending prompts to the Simple AI module. Choose 'proxy' to route through the shared AI Suite server or 'ollama' to send directly to a local Ollama instance.

aiSuite.simple.ollamaBaseUrl.description: The base URL for the local Ollama instance when using the 'ollama' provider. This should be set to the correct address of your local Ollama server.

aiSuite.simple.ollamaModel.description: The default model tag used by the Simple AI module when sending prompts to a local Ollama instance. You can choose from available models.
